stories.title: Winners, losers and dominoes from NBA free agency'...
stories.summary: Which teams are dominating the offseason? Which already wish they could hit the reset button? We picked 10 winners and losers from free agency.

stories.title: NBA free agency is here! Live updates on deals, tr...
stories.summary: We're tracking deals, trades and buzz across the NBA, including the latest on LeBron's next move.

stories.title: USMNT beats Bosnia for 1st WC KO win since '02
stories.summary: The USMNT beat Bosnia-Herzegovina 2-0 in the World Cup round of 32 on Wednesday night for its first knockout win since 2002.

stories.title: Sources: Brown heading to Philly in blockbuster
stories.summary: Jaylen Brown has a new home, with the Celtics agreeing to send their longtime star to the 76ers for Paul George, two first-round picks (2028, '31) and two second-round selections, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Hardaway Sr.: Son can't use retired 10 with Heat
stories.summary: Tim Hardaway Sr. said he isn't letting his retired No. 10 come back into circulation for the Heat, even for his newly signed son.
